tasks.subject: [session-rename-fork] [P1] Create ResponsiveContextMenu shared primitive
[session-rename-fork] [P1] Export ResponsiveContextMenu from shared/ui barrel
tasks.description:
Add the new ResponsiveContextMenu components to the shared UI barrel file so they can be imported via `@/layers/shared/ui`.

**File to modify:** `apps/client/src/layers/shared/ui/index.ts`

**Add the following export block** after the existing `ResponsiveDropdownMenu` exports (around line 156):

```ts
export {
  ResponsiveContextMenu,
  ResponsiveContextMenuTrigger,
  ResponsiveContextMenuContent,
  ResponsiveContextMenuItem,
  ResponsiveContextMenuSeparator,
} from './responsive-context-menu';
```

**Specifically, insert after this existing block:**
```ts
export {
  ResponsiveDropdownMenu,
  ResponsiveDropdownMenuTrigger,
  ResponsiveDropdownMenuContent,
  ResponsiveDropdownMenuLabel,
  ResponsiveDropdownMenuRadioGroup,
  ResponsiveDropdownMenuRadioItem,
} from './responsive-dropdown-menu';
```

**No changes needed to `shared/model/index.ts`** — it already exports `useLongPress` on line 21.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `import { ResponsiveContextMenu, ResponsiveContextMenuTrigger, ResponsiveContextMenuContent, ResponsiveContextMenuItem, ResponsiveContextMenuSeparator } from '@/layers/shared/ui'` resolves correctly
- TypeScript compilation succeeds with no errors
- Existing exports are not disrupted
